title: Repealed
doc_html:
§1624.1. Repealed by Acts 2016, 2nd Es. Sess., No. 10, §2, eff. July 1, 2016.

            NOTE: See Acts 2016, 2nd Ex. Sess., No. 10, §3, regarding applicability.
